description: Output of space_planner. Pre-computed geometry for render_agent. No translated text needed to produce this.

insert_bbox.description: Voronoi-expanded bbox available for translated text insertion.

is_dense.description: True if page is above-average block density.

container_color.description: Fill color [r,g,b] (0-1 floats) of the enclosing background container, if any. Used for text contrast adjustment.

snap_map.description: Maps original y0 string → snapped y0 float for grid alignment.

title_indices.description: Indices into cells[] that are titles.

groups.description: Block reflow groups for vertical reflow. Each block appears in exactly one group. Optional — layout_agent checks for existence before applying reflow.

block_indices.description: 0-based indices into the page's blocks[] array (same order as cells[]).

anchor.description: [x0, y0] top-left corner of the topmost block in the group.

region_bbox.description: Bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1] enclosing all blocks in the group.
